patch_description: The error "No EVOLVE-BLOCK regions found in original content" indicates that the system is trying to parse an empty or malformed file. Since the "Incorrect Program to Fix" section was completely empty, I need to provide the basic program structure that the evolution system expects. The issue is that there's no file content at all to work with. I'll create a minimal working program that follows the expected structure.
error_msg: No EVOLVE-BLOCK regions found in original content
